import { useState } from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const STATS = [ { label: "Today's Orders", value: '34', sub: '+8 from yesterday', icon: '🎫', color: 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-200', text: 'text-blue-700' }, { label: "Today's Revenue", value: '₹8,420', sub: '+12% from yesterday', icon: '💰', color: 'bg-green-50 border-green-200', text: 'text-green-700' }, { label: 'Active Tokens', value: '6', sub: '3 being prepared', icon: '⏳', color: 'bg-amber-50 border-amber-200', text: 'text-amber-700' }, { label: 'Avg Prep Time', value: '18 min', sub: '2 min faster today', icon: '⏱️', color: 'bg-purple-50 border-purple-200', text: 'text-purple-700' }, ]; const RECENT_ORDERS = [ { token: 47, customer: 'Rahul K.', table: 'T-12', items: 'Paneer Tikka, Dal Makhani', total: 425, status: 'preparing', time: '2 min ago' }, { token: 46, customer: 'Priya S.', table: 'T-5', items: 'Butter Chicken, Naan ×2', total: 380, status: 'ready', time: '8 min ago' }, { token: 45, customer: 'Amit R.', table: 'Takeaway', items: 'Chicken Biryani', total: 265, status: 'served', time: '15 min ago' }, { token: 44, customer: 'Sneha P.', table: 'T-3', items: 'Veg Seekh, Masala Chai', total: 235, status: 'served', time: '22 min ago' }, { token: 43, customer: 'Rohan M.', table: 'T-8', items: 'Biryani, Raita', total: 320, status: 'served', time: '30 min ago' }, ]; const STATUS_CFG = { confirmed: { label: 'Confirmed', bg: 'bg-blue-100', text: 'text-blue-700' }, preparing: { label: 'Preparing', bg: 'bg-amber-100', text: 'text-amber-700' }, ready: { label: 'Ready!', bg: 'bg-green-100', text: 'text-green-700' }, served: { label: 'Served', bg: 'bg-gray-100', text: 'text-gray-500' }, }; const HOURLY = [ { hour: '9am', orders: 3 }, { hour: '10am', orders: 5 }, { hour: '11am', orders: 8 }, { hour: '12pm', orders: 14 }, { hour: '1pm', orders: 12 }, { hour: '2pm', orders: 9 }, { hour: '3pm', orders: 6 }, { hour: '4pm', orders: 4 }, { hour: '5pm', orders: 7 }, { hour: '6pm', orders: 11 }, { hour: '7pm', orders: 14 }, { hour: '8pm', orders: 10 }, ]; export default function Overview() { const navigate = useNavigate(); const maxOrders = Math.max(...HOURLY.map(h => h.orders)); return (
{/* Welcome */}

Good afternoon 👋

Here's what's happening at your restaurant today.

{/* Stats cards */}
{STATS.map((s, i) => (
{s.icon} Today
{s.value}
{s.label}
{s.sub}
))}
{/* Chart + Quick actions */}
{/* Hourly bar chart */}

Orders per hour (today)

Total: 34 orders
{HOURLY.map((h, i) => (
{h.hour}
))}
{/* Quick actions */}

Quick actions

{[ { icon: '🎫', label: 'Live order queue', desc: '6 active tokens', to: '/dashboard/orders', red: true }, { icon: '🍽️', label: 'Add menu item', desc: 'Update your menu', to: '/dashboard/menu', red: false }, { icon: '🪑', label: 'Manage tables', desc: '12 tables total', to: '/dashboard/tables', red: false }, { icon: '📈', label: 'View reports', desc: 'Sales & analytics', to: '/dashboard/reports', red: false }, ].map((a, i) => ( ))}
{/* Recent orders table */}

Recent orders

{RECENT_ORDERS.map((o, i) => { const cfg = STATUS_CFG[o.status]; return ( ); })}
Token Customer Table Items Total Status Time
#{o.token} {o.customer} {o.table} {o.items} ₹{o.total} {cfg.label} {o.time}
); }
